title: scRNA-seq Tumour Microenvironment Analysis
question: How does MSI status remodel the immune microenvironment in GEA?
dataset_target: MSI-stratified GEA tumour scRNA-seq (e.g. Pelka 2021 CRC atlas, ~2 GB)
dataset_actual_poc: 10x Genomics PBMC 3k (2,700 PBMCs from a healthy donor)
substitution_reason: Full MSI/TME analysis needs a larger gated dataset; PBMC 3k is the canonical scanpy/Seurat tutorial dataset for infrastructure validation
status: Runnable POC (infrastructure check only — does NOT answer the MSI/TME question)
reproduce_command: pip install scanpy igraph leidenalg pandas numpy scipy matplotlib && python scripts/poc/run_poc.py

headline_result.interpretation: Recovers canonical T/B/Monocyte/NK lineage structure; cluster markers match Seurat tutorial within ~10–15%

limitations: PBMC3k is a healthy-donor benchmark, not a tumour sample — no MSI/tumour metadata
Marker-based annotation uses 5-type argmax over mean expression; small clusters (e.g. megakaryocyte, dendritic) get mis-labelled
Leiden res=0.5 returns 7 clusters vs tutorial's 8; CD4/CD8 T not split
POC does not cover integration, batch correction, doublet detection, pseudotime, or CellChat — those belong to the full analysis
Full MSI/TME analysis requires a larger gated dataset (Pelka 2021 ~2 GB) and is out of scope for the POC
role: MSI/TME question framing, cluster-vs-immunology review, clinical interpretation. Implementation AI-assisted.
